mission.title: kubevirt: copy on write volumes as delta for read only volumes.
mission.description: copy on write volumes as delta for read only volumes.. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current kubevirt deployment
steps.description:
Verify your virtctl version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt
helm list -n kubevirt 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working kubevirt installation.

steps.title: Review kubevirt configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kubevirt configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt
kubectl get configmap -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevirt
```
The feature request here is to facilitate copy on write backing volumes for read-only volumes.

steps.title: Apply the fix for copy on write volumes as delta for read only volumes.
steps.description:
WIP. lets come to an agreement on the API, then I'll lock this down with func/unit tests. 

This PR adds a new, `CopyOnWrite`, field to ContainerDisks which makes it possible for ContainerDisks to be used with persistence across restarts. The API is structured in a way that allows expanding (in the
```yaml
volumes:
  - containerDisk:
      image: kubevirt/fedora-cloud-container-disk-demo:devel
      copyOnWrite:
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          claimName: my-pvc
    name: containerdisk
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt
kubectl get events -n kubevirt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "copy on write volumes as delta for read only volumes." is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
WIP. lets come to an agreement on the API, then I'll lock this down with func/unit tests. 

This PR adds a new, `CopyOnWrite`, field to ContainerDisks which makes it possible for ContainerDisks to be used with persistence across restarts.
codeSnippets:
volumes:
  - containerDisk:
      image: kubevirt/fedora-cloud-container-disk-demo:devel
      copyOnWrite:
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          claimName: my-pvc
    name: containerdisk

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kubevirt installed or the issue environment reproducible.
